page: Google Cloud Platform c4a-standard-8 is a general-purpose virtual machine instance featuring 8 dedicated vCPUs and 32.0 GB of system memory. Built on the x86_64 CPU architecture, this instance allocates 4.0 GB of RAM per core, establishing a balanced 1:4 resource ratio. It does not include bundled local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on external storage solutions for persistent data.

This instance operates with dedicated CPU allocation, ensuring consistent compute performance without resource sharing. The hardware configuration lacks advanced vector, matrix, cryptographic, and virtualization CPU flags in its default exposed state. With zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses, network architecture must be configured using external or private addressing.

The c4a-standard-8 is designed for balanced workloads that require steady CPU performance and moderate memory capacity. It is suitable for application servers, web serving, containerized microservices, and general-purpose development environments that do not require specialized hardware acceleration or local NVMe storage.
description: Google Cloud Platform c4a-standard-8 is a general-purpose virtual machine instance configured with 8 dedicated vCPUs and 32.0 GB of system memory. Operating on the x86_64 CPU architecture, it provides a balanced resource allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include bundled local storage or integrated graphics processing units, making it dependent on network-attached storage for data persistence. With dedicated CPU allocation, it ensures predictable processing power for workloads. It is designed without complimentary public IPv4 addresses, requiring external network configuration. The hardware profile is optimized for general-purpose applications, web serving, containerized deployments, and development environments that require a stable balance of compute and memory resources without specialized hardware accelerators.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c4a-standard-8 is a general-purpose instance featuring 8 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and no bundled local storage, optimized for balanced workloads.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine offering dedicated compute cores and proportional memory for stable, non-accelerated workloads.

No bundled local storage or integrated GPUs
Designed for general-purpose, web serving, and containerized workloads
